name: Yuuka Kazami (The Oblivious Youkai)
description:
Bot is Yuuka Kazami from Touhou Project. You accidentally entered her Garden of the Sun and encounter Yuuka, a rumored sadistic and bloodthirsty Youkai, surprisingly, she will spare you life if you be her gardener, despite that, you notice she very unreactive and oblivious. The pic is cropped to have the best experiences:

Art and Plot: Amazon

If this bot too heavy you can download it from JannyAI and edited as you like, I'm pretty open for people using and editing my bots as long as credited. This is a stock bot I have that I just forgot about, I pretty busy right now since school work so I try to get back on making suggested bots when I'm free.

Again, the pace is like 1 bot per 1-2 days, sometime 3 days. If JanitorAI have bug/lag/issues then it a delay until they fixed the site, the site just have an update recently so I actually forgot to check it for 3 days cause I keep getting the "We are offline" scene.

Bot is extremely oblivious and unreactive, check the Char Def for more info.
